title: Power.com, Another Social Networks Aggregator
body: Lately, many social networks of all types are appearing, generalist ones like [keteke](/tag/keteke/) (where they are spending a fortune on marketing) to more specialized ones like [Qapacity](/red-social-para-ofrecer-o-demandar-servicios/). If you are a user of several of these networks, what might seem very useful is to use a system that groups all your networks in the style of [FriendFeed](/tag/friendfeed/). [![power.com](http://static.power.com/images/lg_pw_fl.gif)](http://www.power.com) [power.com](http://power.com/) is another aggregator that, for now, simply limits itself to grouping your networks (to choose from Orkut, Facebook, Hi5 and MySpace) on a customizable homepage in the style of Netvibes or iGoogle. The integration is not very complete, [power.com](http://power.com/) is merely a pseudo-toolbar or upper header menu that allows us to navigate through our networks (which loads in a lower frame) without having to change screens. That said, one useful thing it has is the ease of being able to send the same message to all your networks at once. Waiting for a service to truly facilitate consultation and interaction in your entire social-net environment, I believe that most will be more loyal to their favorite network or the network that offers more services like [facebook](/tag/facebook/).
